ALREADY_IN_GROUP: You are already in a group.
NOT_IN_ANY_GROUP: You don't belong to any groups.
UNKNOWN_ERROR_ON_GROUP_CREATION: An unknown error occurred while creating the group.
REMOVE_MEMBER_FROM_GROUP: Do you wish to remove %s from your group?
DISBAND_CONFIRM: Do you wish to disband your group?
LEAVE_CONFIRM: Do you wish to leave your group?
CANNOT_KICK_YOURSELF: You cannot kick yourself from the group.
PLAYER_NOT_IN_YOUR_GROUP: The player is not in your group.
ONLY_LEADER_CAN_KICK: Only the group leader can kick members.
PLAYER_KICKED_SUCCESSFULLY: Player has been kicked from the group successfully.
GROUP_DISBANDED_SUCCESSFULLY: You have disbanded the group successfully.
LEFT_GROUP_SUCCESSFULLY: You have left the group successfully.
ONLY_LEADER_CAN_TOGGLE_INVITING: Only the group leader can toggle inviting players.
NO_LONGER_INV_PLAYERS: You are no longer inviting players.
GROUP_NOT_OPEN_FOR_INVITES: The group is not open for inviting new players.
INVITED_TO_GROUP: You have been invited to join a group. Do you wish to accept?
ONLY_LEADER_CAN_INVITE: Only the group leader can invite new members.
PLAYER_ALREADY_IN_GROUP: This player already belongs to a group.
JOINED_GROUP_SUCCESSFULLY: You have joined the group successfully.
TOO_FAR_FROM_LEADER_TO_JOIN: You are too far from the group leader to join the group.
GROUP_INVITE_FROM: Do you wish to accept the group invite from %s?
FAILED_TO_RESET_COOLDOWN_KEY: Failed to reset cooldown on key %s
PLAYER_ALREADY_IN_PARTY_TYPE: Player is already in a party of this type.
PARTY_ALREADY_IN_QUEUE: Party is already in this queue.
PARTY_TYPE_MISMATCH: Party type does not match queue type.
CMD_FIND_PLAYER_IN_QUEUES_IDENTIFIER: The identifier of the player to find
PRIO_SET_SUCCESSFULLY: Priority for party %s set to %d successfully.
BLOCKED_STATE_TO_SET: Blocked state to set [1 = blocked, 0 = unblocked]
SET_BLOCKED_QUEUE_STATE: Set blocked state of queue: ^6%s^7 to %s
SET_QUEUE_TOTAL_BLOCK: Set blocking state for all queues
SET_QUEUE_TOTAL_BLOCK2: Total blocked state to set [1 = blocked, 0 = unblocked]
QUEUE_TOTAL_BLOCK_SET: Set total blocked state of UniQueue to %s
QUEUE_DEVMODE_CMD: Toggles displaying dev data from uniqueue in server console
SET_POLICE_POWER: Set additional police power for UniQueue
POLICE_POWER_AMOUNT: Amount of police power to set
POLICE_POWER_SET: Set additional police power by command to: %d
GROUP_HAS_NO_PARTY_IN_UNIQUEUE: The group has no party created.
QUEUE_NOT_FOUND_2: The specified queue was not found.
COMMAND_ADD_ALLOWLIST_DESC: Adds a whitelist to a players character
COMMAND_ADD_ALLOWLIST_NO_PLAYER_FOUND: No player found to give whitelist: %s
COMMAND_ADD_ALLOWLIST_FAILED: Unable to add whitelist: %s to player: %s [%s]
COMMAND_REMOVE_ALLOWLIST_DESC: Removes a whielist from a players character
COMMAND_REMOVE_ALLOWLIST_NO_PLAYER_FOUND: No player found to remove whitelist: %s
COMMAND_REMOVE_ALLOWLIST_FAILED: Unable to remove whitelist: %s from player: %s [%s]
ALREADY_PLACING_PROP: You are already in a prop creator
PROP_PLACEMENT_TOO_FAR: You can't place it that far away
SUCH_ITEM_CANNOT_BE_SOLD: That item cannot be sold here
TOTAL_CHANCE_OF_ITEMS_DOES_NOT_ADD_UP_TO: Total chance of items does not add up to 100.
WINNING_ITEM_NOT_FOUND_IN_CASE_ERROR: Winning item not found in case.
PLAYER_HAS_NO_CASES: You have no cases to open.
FAILED_TO_REMOVE_CASE_FROM_INVENTORY_ERR: Failed to remove case from inventory.
CASE_OPENING_SPAM_ERROR: Don't spam the case opening, please wait a moment before trying again.
